steps.note: +job/listaccess shows every configured bucket and which staff IDs (if any) have explicit access. '(all staff)' means no restriction is set for that bucket. Requires superuser.

steps.label: view the full bucket access map

steps.note: +job/addaccess <BUCKET>=<name> grants a staff member explicit access to a bucket. Once any entry exists, only listed staff can see that bucket. +job/removeaccess reverses this.

steps.label: grant Alice access to the CGEN bucket

steps.expect: >JOBS: Alice granted access to CGEN bucket.

steps.label: confirm CGEN now shows Alice's ID

steps.note: +job/bucket <BUCKET> limits the staff job list to a single bucket. The calling staff member must have access to that bucket.

steps.cmd: +request/create BUG/Typo in +pose=Extra space after the colon in pose output.
steps.label: player submits a BUG-bucket job
filter job list to BUG bucket only
